channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pratas Island: Beijing's Next Pressure Point and Washington's Next Test
item.description: A Chinese invasion of Taiwan could begin with this small, remote island.

item.title: The Atheist Roots of Modern Antisemitism
item.description: The rejection of biblical religion has influenced both cultural elites and populist agitators.

item.title: Not Your Father's Ferrari... but Whose Is It?
item.description: Electric vehicles have their place, but probably not in my garage.

item.title: A Year of Deregulation Ignited an American Nuclear Renaissance
item.description: Trump's May 2025 executive orders led to a productive year for nuclear power.
